name: Invisibility
description: A creature you touch has the Invisible condition until the spell ends. The spell ends early immediately after the target makes an attack roll, deals damage, or casts a spell. Engine: ends on the target's first attack (via end-on-attack hooks in `runSingleEnemyTurn` / `runSingleAllyTurn` for NPC targets, and `doAttack` for self-cast); 'deals damage' and 'casts a spell' triggers are descriptive only for now. Click yourself to self-cast, or click any creature within reach.
scaling: You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 2 (engine: not yet wired — single-target only).
